# gcore_cloud_project (Resource)

Projects are organizational units that group cloud resources for access control and billing.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "gcore_cloud_project" "example_cloud_project" {
  name = "my-project"
  description = "Project description"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Unique project name for a client. Each client always has one "default" project.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the project.

### Read-Only

- `client_id` (Number) ID associated with the client.
- `created_at` (String) Datetime of creation, which is automatically generated.
- `id` (Number) Project ID, which is automatically generated upon creation.
- `is_default` (Boolean) Indicates if the project is the default one. Each client always has one default project.
- `state` (String) The state of the project.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
$ terraform import gcore_cloud_project.example '<project_id>'
```
